name: 400 MG Ibuprofen Tablets IP
about: 400 MG Ibuprofen Tablets IP is a general medicine that is commonly used to relieve mild to moderate pain, inflammation, and fever. The tablets contain 400mg of ibuprofen, which is a nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) that works by reducing the production of prostaglandins, a chemical that causes pain and inflammation in the body. This medicine is manufactured in India and comes in the form of tablets. To maintain the effectiveness of the medicine, it is advisable to store it in a dry and cool place. The dosage of the medicine should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What is the active ingredient in 400 MG Ibuprofen Tablets IP?
faq.a: The active ingredient in 400 MG Ibuprofen Tablets IP is ibuprofen.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of this medicine?
faq.a: The dosage of the medicine should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What is the physical form of this medicine?
faq.a: This medicine comes in the form of tablets.

faq.q: Is this medicine suitable for all types of pain?
faq.a: No, this medicine is suitable for mild to moderate pain, inflammation, and fever.

faq.q: Can I store this medicine in any place?
faq.a: No, to maintain the effectiveness of the medicine, it is advisable to store it in a dry and cool place.
